## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX and Silversmith Capital Partners to explore potential investment opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has rapidly grown to $11M ARR with 50+ customers, offering AI-powered content creation and marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Company considering $40-60M fundraise to accelerate go-to-market and engineering, though not initially planning to raise](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [Differentiated by expert-led approach, proprietary AI workflows, and high-touch service model vs. self-serve tools](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Strong customer traction and expansion, with 120%+ NRR and upsells from satisfied clients](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview and Traction

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, former CMO with track record of building content engines at IBM, HP, HashiCorp, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Launched Sept 2022, raised $12M seed in Feb 2023, now at $11M ARR run rate with 50+ customers](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [72% gross margins as of August, burning only $3M total to reach current scale](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Key clients include Webflow, Sentinel One, Abnormal Security, Ramp, Clerk](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Seeing strong word-of-mouth growth and referrals, including from investors](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)

### Product and Service Offering

  - [AI-powered content creation platform with human experts in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Combines strategy, AI workflows, and "forward deployed experts" for execution](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint + 12-month work stream model, $9K-$230K MRR per customer](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Internal platform manages workflows, research, editing, fact-checking, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Evolving toward customer-facing dashboard and expert marketplace](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Not losing deals to agencies or other AI tools like Jasper, Copy.ai](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Main competition is internal teams or DIY attempts with workflow tools](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [Differentiated by end-to-end service model vs. self-serve AI writing tools](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Planning to launch CheckThat.ai as first standalone product for AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)

### Fundraising Plans

  - [Considering $40-60M raise to accelerate growth and product development](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [Not demand constrained - could grow faster by increasing sales capacity](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Want to invest more in go-to-market and engineering](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2027.0)
  - [Evaluating growth equity partners who can go deep on the business model](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2083.0)

### Customer Success and Expansion

  - [120%+ net revenue retention, with multiple recent upsells](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [Long-term customers like Ramp (12+ months, 700+ content pieces)](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Proactive upsells as customers expand use cases (e.g. Metronome, Superhuman)](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Focused on ideal customer profile - firing some early misfit customers](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send investment memo with financials to Silversmith team](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2344.0)
  - [Silversmith to review internally and determine interest in further diligence](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2388.0)
  - [If proceeding, Silversmith to conduct customer reference calls (e.g. Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2317.0)
  - [Potential deeper dives on technology, go-to-market strategy, and financials](https://fathom.video/share/xA9E1R7f6ns5dG1ybxvaSnVCXW1Cv4KQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2388.0)
